message:
chore(perf): regenerate budget reports (binary_size now NO_DATA, 0 failures)

Refreshed perf budget artifacts from 2026-02-17T02:36:05Z run:
- binary_size_release: FAIL→NO_DATA (no candidate pi binary found in
  target/release or target/perf; previous run was measuring a debug
  binary at 489MB which was a false positive)
- idle_memory_rss: 9.6→10.6 MB (still well within 50MB budget)
- CI-enforced failures: 1→0 (the binary size false positive was the
  only CI failure)
- Failing data contracts: 7→8 (added missing artifact contract for
  binary_size_release since no binary exists to measure)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
